description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat green roof, featuring a rooftop terrace equipped with outdoor furniture and what appears to be HVAC units. The front facade is characterized by large glass windows and a double garage door, with a paved driveway and a small landscaped garden. The property is enclosed by a low, light-colored perimeter wall and is surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. The rear of the bungalow includes a spacious patio area with floor-to-ceiling glass doors opening to the backyard, which is landscaped with palm trees and a swimming pool. The side views reveal additional windows and access points, as well as the continuation of the green roof and terrace features. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat green roof, rooftop terrace, large glass windows, and landscaped gardens, enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, large windows, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop terrace, green roof, and the boundary wall with trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive glass doors, backyard patio, swimming pool, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the green roof, and the pool area with palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
